description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs a before_script installing zip, p7zip, unzip, cmake, valgrind and libtbb-dev via apt-get, then builds the 'chico' target with make in src. Define a single job named compile_and_test (default stage) that first executes ./validate_all.sh in the test_scripts directory, then modifies src/Makefile replacing DNDEBUG with ggdb and O9 with O0, cleans and builds all targets with make, and finally runs ./validate_kernel_consistency.sh in test_scripts. The job uses the default runner image, has no caches, artifacts, services, or deployment steps, and runs on every pipeline.
